src: AcquireMock is a full-featured mock payment gateway built for reliable testing of any e-commerce integration. It simulates real payment flows with OTP verification, HMAC-signed webhooks, and a modern user interface.
ja: AcquireMockはECサイト連携の信頼性テスト向けに構築されたフル機能のモック決済ゲートウェイ。OTP認証、HMAC署名付きWebhook、モダンなUIで実際の決済フローをシミュレート。
